observedPreconditions: Username, password textbox, login button and forgot password link should be visible on this page
observedValidations: User should be able to login with valid credentials
Sign in failed with invalid or incorrect credentials with invalid credential message
Successful login take the user to dashboard page: https://opensource-demo.orangehrmlive.com/web/index.php/dashboard/index
Click on the manda user and then logout button should navigate back to login page
